options.name: -align_track
options.description: Specify layer track which route blockages align to.

options.name: -consider_cells_as_macros
options.description: Specify cell names which tool takes them as macros. Blockages will not be created over them.

options.name: -consider_macros_as_cells
options.description: Specify cell names which tool takes them as std cells. Blockages will be created over them.

options.name: -edge_shrink
options.description: Shrink row area from edge in X and Y direction.

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specify layer name to create route blockages for stream out.

options.name: -no_cut_row
options.description: Specify whether add blockage based on cut row site area even though row site area isn't cut in design
